FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct AcrylicSpec

Namespace
FluentGpu.Foundation
Assembly
FluentGpu.Foundation.dll

A per-node acrylic (frosted glass): the engine samples the canvas behind the node, resolves transparent backdrop through Fallback, blurs it (BlurSigma), then applies WinUI's luminosity/tint recipe. Realized by the PushLayer/PopLayer backdrop subsystem.

public readonly record struct AcrylicSpec : IEquatable<AcrylicSpec>
Implements
IEquatable<AcrylicSpec>

noiseOpacity float
luminosityOpacity float

AcrylicSpec(ColorF, float, float, float, float, ColorF)

A per-node acrylic (frosted glass): the engine samples the canvas behind the node, resolves transparent backdrop through Fallback, blurs it (BlurSigma), then applies WinUI's luminosity/tint recipe. Realized by the PushLayer/PopLayer backdrop subsystem.

public AcrylicSpec(ColorF Tint, float TintOpacity, float BlurSigma, float NoiseOpacity, float LuminosityOpacity, ColorF Fallback)

Parameters

Tint ColorF
TintOpacity float
BlurSigma float
NoiseOpacity float
LuminosityOpacity float
Fallback ColorF

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
